creator: jmd@freebsd.org
text:
FWIW, I am using pocl 0.13 to develop OpenCL code and it works well. I have used prior versions with the same success. Unlike freeocl (which is in the ports collection), this integrates nicely with ocl-icd loader and the rest of the OpenCL infrastructure we recently established.

This port would be a very good addition to the ports collection to allow wider adaption of OpenCL in FreeBSD.
